prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTMBSPS-6X75-STL Product Type: ART_AND_CRAFT_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Metal Bead Scoop Polished Steel Description: Sort and organize your beads easily with the Universal Tool Metal Bead Scoop.

This tool is necessary for handling your beads, gemstones and other jewelry making materials. The scoop design will allow you to sort and scoop your beads with ease.

The scoop itself measures 6" x .75", and is constructed of strong polished stainless steel. Make sure to grab one of these bead scoops before your next jewelry making project. Search Terms: bead counter jewelry making sorter crafting supplies containers Features: - Size: 6" x .75" - Material: Polished Stainless Steel - Easily Scoop & Sort Beads - Essential Jewelry Making Tool === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6" x .75" Polished Steel Bead Scoop

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 6in Polished Steel Bead Scoop

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Construction, Scoop And Sort Beads, Gemstones And Jewelry Materials, Essential Jewelry Making Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Precision Sorting Tool, 6 Inch By 75 Inch, Polished Stainless Steel, For Beads And Gemstones, Jewelry Making Essential
